ideas.title: Whispering Waves Lullaby
ideas.hook: Hush now, little one, listen to the ocean's gentle song
ideas.theme: The calming sound of waves crashing helps soothe babies to sleep

ideas.title: Raindrop Lullaby
ideas.hook: Gently falling raindrops, lull you to a peaceful slumber
ideas.theme: The soft patter of raindrops creates a calming and sleep-inducing environment for babies

ideas.title: Soft Wind Lullaby
ideas.hook: Feel the soft wind blowing, it's time to close your eyes and dream
ideas.theme: The gentle breeze soothes babies and helps them relax before sleep

ideas.title: Nighttime Nature Sounds
ideas.hook: Listen to the forest as it sings you a lullaby
ideas.theme: The peaceful and calming sounds of nature help babies fall asleep

ideas.title: Starry Night Lullaby
ideas.hook: Twinkle, twinkle, little star, guide you to your peaceful bed
ideas.theme: The night sky and its stars provide a calming and sleep-inducing environment for babies
